original_text: CEO Brian Chesky announced strategic shifts during the earnings call, stating the company will pursue hotels 'significantly more aggressively' going forward C008. The announcement coincided with a post-earnings share decline of roughly 6% C008. Separately, Chesky outlined an AI-first strategy for travel planning, noting 'you can't do travel planning without AI going forward' as Airbnb expands its customer service agent capabilities C010. R&D intensity remained elevated at 19.70% of revenue in Q2 2025, reflecting continued investment in technology infrastructure K005.
revised_text: CEO Brian Chesky announced strategic shifts during the earnings call, stating the company will pursue hotels 'significantly more aggressively' going forward C081. The announcement coincided with a post-earnings share decline of roughly 6% C081. Separately, Chesky outlined an AI-first strategy for travel planning, noting 'you can't do travel planning without AI going forward' as Airbnb expands its customer service agent capabilities C083. R&D intensity was 19.70% of revenue in Q2 2025, reflecting investment in technology infrastructure K005.
changes_summary: Updated inline citations from C008 to C081 and C010 to C083 to match the verified evidence sources identified by the fact-checker. Removed the word 'remained' and 'continued' from the R&D intensity sentence to eliminate unsupported trend claims, as the cited calculation K005 only provides data for Q2 2025 without historical comparison.
